articles.title: Gold drifts lower with eyes on US-Iran developments - KITCO
articles.snippet: April 15 (Reuters) - Gold ​drifted lower on Wednesday after hitting a one-month peak as investors assessed ‌the latest signals on the U.S.–Iran situation and what they could mean for the interest rate outlook.
